examples: He lapsed from Judaism when he was a student.
He was brought up in a family that practised traditional Judaism.
They carried with them the idea and the traditions that laid the foundation for the major religions of the western world: Judaism, Christianity and Islam.
Judaism was practiced freely, the borders were safe and the construction frenzy boosted employment.
Jerusalem is the Holy Land, cherished ground to three great faiths: Judaism, Islam and Christianity.
